mapper.select: select i.in_id, i.ent_code, i.in_no, i.in_time, i.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, i.arrival_no, i.purchaser, i.in_user, i.status, i.audit_by, i.audit_time, i.audit_remark, i.total_qty, i.total_amount, i.stock_effect_status, i.remark, i.create_time, i.update_time from t_material_in_order i left join t_material_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = i.warehouse_id where i.in_id = #{inId}

select in_item_id, in_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, in_qty, unit_price, amount, sort_num, remark from t_material_in_order_item where in_id = #{inId} order by sort_num asc, in_item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_in_order (in_id, ent_code, in_no, in_time, warehouse_id, arrival_no, purchaser, in_user, status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, total_qty, total_amount, stock_effect_status, remark) values (#{inId}, #{entCode}, #{inNo}, #{inTime}, #{warehouseId}, #{arrivalNo}, #{purchaser}, #{inUser}, #{status}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{stockEffectStatus}, #{remark})

insert into t_material_in_order_item (in_item_id, in_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, in_qty, unit_price, amount, sort_num, remark) values
(#{item.inItemId}, #{item.inId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.modelSpec}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.unit}, #{item.inQty}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select apply_id, ent_code, apply_no, apply_time, apply_reason, apply_user, contact_phone, expected_receive_time, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, out_status, return_status, total_qty, remark, create_time, update_time from t_material_apply_order where apply_id = #{applyId}

select apply_item_id, apply_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, return_qty, purpose_desc, sort_num, remark from t_material_apply_order_item where apply_id = #{applyId} order by sort_num asc, apply_item_id asc

select apply_item_id, apply_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, return_qty, purpose_desc, sort_num, remark from t_material_apply_order_item where apply_item_id = #{applyItemId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_apply_order (apply_id, ent_code, apply_no, apply_time, apply_reason, apply_user, contact_phone, expected_receive_time, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, out_status, return_status, total_qty, remark) values (#{applyId}, #{entCode}, #{applyNo}, #{applyTime}, #{applyReason}, #{applyUser}, #{contactPhone}, #{expectedReceiveTime}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{outStatus}, #{returnStatus}, #{totalQty}, #{remark})

insert into t_material_apply_order_item (apply_item_id, apply_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, return_qty, purpose_desc, sort_num, remark) values
(#{item.applyItemId}, #{item.applyId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.modelSpec}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.unit}, #{item.applyQty}, #{item.outQty}, #{item.returnQty}, #{item.purposeDesc}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select count(*) from t_material_out_order where apply_id = #{applyId}
mapper.update: update t_material_apply_order_item set out_qty = ifnull(out_qty, 0) + #{qty} where apply_item_id = #{applyItemId}
update t_material_apply_order_item set out_qty = ifnull(out_qty, 0) - #{qty} where apply_item_id = #{applyItemId}
update t_material_apply_order_item set return_qty = ifnull(return_qty, 0) + #{qty} where apply_item_id = #{applyItemId}
update t_material_apply_order_item set return_qty = ifnull(return_qty, 0) - #{qty} where apply_item_id = #{applyItemId}
mapper.select: select o.out_id, o.ent_code, o.out_no, o.out_time, o.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, o.apply_id, a.apply_no, o.receive_user, o.out_user, o.audit_by, o.audit_time, o.audit_remark, o.status, o.stock_effect_status, o.total_qty, o.total_amount, o.remark, o.create_time, o.update_time from t_material_out_order o left join t_material_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = o.warehouse_id left join t_material_apply_order a on a.apply_id = o.apply_id where o.out_id = #{outId}

select out_item_id, out_id, apply_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, returned_qty, unit_price, amount, sort_num, remark from t_material_out_order_item where out_id = #{outId} order by sort_num asc, out_item_id asc

select out_item_id, out_id, apply_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, returned_qty, unit_price, amount, sort_num, remark from t_material_out_order_item where out_item_id = #{outItemId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_out_order (out_id, ent_code, out_no, out_time, warehouse_id, apply_id, receive_user, out_user, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, status, stock_effect_status, total_qty, total_amount, remark) values (#{outId}, #{entCode}, #{outNo}, #{outTime}, #{warehouseId}, #{applyId}, #{receiveUser}, #{outUser}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{status}, #{stockEffectStatus}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{remark})

insert into t_material_out_order_item (out_item_id, out_id, apply_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, apply_qty, out_qty, returned_qty, unit_price, amount, sort_num, remark) values
(#{item.outItemId}, #{item.outId}, #{item.applyItemId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.modelSpec}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.unit}, #{item.applyQty}, #{item.outQty}, #{item.returnedQty}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select count(*) from t_material_return_order where out_id = #{outId}
mapper.update: update t_material_out_order_item set returned_qty = ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{qty} where out_item_id = #{outItemId}
update t_material_out_order_item set returned_qty = ifnull(returned_qty, 0) - #{qty} where out_item_id = #{outItemId}
mapper.select: select r.return_id, r.ent_code, r.return_no, r.apply_id, r.out_id, r.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, r.apply_time, r.return_time, r.return_user, r.audit_by, r.audit_time, r.audit_remark, r.handler_user, r.status, r.stock_effect_status, r.total_qty, r.stock_in_qty, r.remark, r.create_time, r.update_time from t_material_return_order r left join t_material_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = r.warehouse_id where r.return_id = #{returnId}

select return_item_id, return_id, out_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, out_qty, can_return_qty, return_qty, stock_in_qty, process_result, sort_num, remark from t_material_return_order_item where return_id = #{returnId} order by sort_num asc, return_item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_return_order (return_id, ent_code, return_no, apply_id, out_id, warehouse_id, apply_time, return_time, return_user, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, handler_user, status, stock_effect_status, total_qty, stock_in_qty, remark) values (#{returnId}, #{entCode}, #{returnNo}, #{applyId}, #{outId}, #{warehouseId}, #{applyTime}, #{returnTime}, #{returnUser}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{handlerUser}, #{status}, #{stockEffectStatus}, #{totalQty}, #{stockInQty}, #{remark})

insert into t_material_return_order_item (return_item_id, return_id, out_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_name, unit, out_qty, can_return_qty, return_qty, stock_in_qty, process_result, sort_num, remark) values
(#{item.returnItemId}, #{item.returnId}, #{item.outItemId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.modelSpec}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.unit}, #{item.outQty}, #{item.canReturnQty}, #{item.returnQty}, #{item.stockInQty}, #{item.processResult}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select:
select material_id, ent_code, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_code, category_name, unit, unit_price, min_stock, status from t_material_info where material_id in
#{materialId}

select stock_id, ent_code, warehouse_id, material_id, current_qty, available_qty, frozen_qty, min_stock, stock_status, last_change_time, create_time, update_time from t_material_stock where ent_code = #{entCode} and warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_stock (stock_id, ent_code, warehouse_id, material_id, current_qty, available_qty, frozen_qty, min_stock, stock_status, last_change_time) values (#{stockId}, #{entCode}, #{warehouseId}, #{materialId}, #{currentQty}, #{availableQty}, #{frozenQty}, #{minStock}, #{stockStatus}, #{lastChangeTime})

insert into t_material_stock_flow (flow_id, ent_code, warehouse_id, material_id, biz_type, biz_id, biz_item_id, biz_no, qty_change, before_qty, after_qty, before_available_qty, after_available_qty, before_frozen_qty, after_frozen_qty, operate_by, operate_time, remark) values (#{flowId}, #{entCode}, #{warehouseId}, #{materialId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{bizItemId}, #{bizNo}, #{qtyChange}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{beforeAvailableQty}, #{afterAvailableQty}, #{beforeFrozenQty}, #{afterFrozenQty}, #{operateBy}, #{operateTime}, #{remark})
